methodology: Identify top authority pages (high internal link count, strong content signals, oldest published dates) and map authority transfer paths to page 2 rankings, money pages, and emerging clusters.

identification_criteria: Pages with FAQ schema + comparison tables + affiliate links
estimated_authority_hubs: Category pages: Dog Supplies, Cat Supplies, Fish Supplies, Pet Care
Hub pages: Puppy Care, Dog Beds, Indoor Cats, Cat Toys, Dog Health
Trust pages: About Jason, Methodology, Review Process
Top-performing guides in each cluster (longest content, most internal links)

page_2_rankings.strategy: Add contextual links from top 25 authority pages to posts ranking positions 11-20
page_2_rankings.method: Identify GSC page 2 queries, match to target posts, inject 2-3 internal links from authority pages

money_pages.strategy: Boost affiliate-heavy comparison/review posts with authority links
money_pages.targets: Best-of posts with affiliate links but lower rankings
money_pages.method: Link from educational hub pages to commercial comparison posts
money_pages.expected_impact: Revenue-ready pages move into ranking positions

fish_supplies_cluster.strategy: Transfer authority from established clusters (Dog/Cat) to newer Fish Supplies
fish_supplies_cluster.method: Cross-category relevant links where pet care overlap exists
fish_supplies_cluster.current_state: 50 posts, new cluster, needs authority injection
fish_supplies_cluster.expected_impact: Accelerated indexation and ranking for fish content

category_pages.strategy: Strengthen category archive pages as authority hubs
category_pages.method: Ensure every spoke post links back to category hub, add schema
category_pages.expected_impact: Category pages rank for head terms

implementation_plan.action: Map top 25 authority pages by inbound link count
Identify page 2 targets from GSC position data
Create authority transfer links (3-5 per target)
